findings.description: Briefings GET API accepts query parameters (sortBy, order, page, pageSize, type, status) without zod schema validation, using raw parseInt and type casting instead
findings.remediation: Add briefingQuerySchema with zod enum whitelist for sortBy/type/status and coerce validation for page/pageSize, matching the pattern used in all other GET endpoints

findings.description: Content-Security-Policy includes 'unsafe-eval' and 'unsafe-inline' in script-src directive, weakening XSS protection
findings.remediation: Remove 'unsafe-eval' (likely unnecessary for production). Replace 'unsafe-inline' with nonce-based CSP using Next.js middleware nonce generation

findings.description: Seven API route catch blocks log full error objects via console.error, potentially exposing AWS credentials, Bedrock endpoints, or internal paths in server logs
findings.remediation: Log only err.message or use a structured logger (pino/winston) with sensitive field masking

findings.description: CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin set to '*' for all API routes
findings.remediation: Restrict to specific allowed origins in production deployment

findings.description: Strict-Transport-Security header not set (acceptable for prototype HTTP development)
findings.remediation: Add HSTS header for production HTTPS deployment

findings.description: Mock auth token is unsigned Base64-encoded JSON, easily forgeable (intentional prototype design per NFR-001)
findings.remediation: Replace with Amazon Cognito or signed JWT with httpOnly cookies for production

production_notes: Implement real authentication with Amazon Cognito and httpOnly cookie sessions
Add authentication middleware to all API routes (currently all endpoints are publicly accessible)
Strengthen CSP by removing 'unsafe-eval' and 'unsafe-inline', switching to nonce-based policy
Restrict CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin from '*' to specific allowed domains
Add Strict-Transport-Security header for HTTPS production deployment
Add rate limiting to all API endpoints
Replace console.error with structured logging (pino/winston) with sensitive field masking
Add zod validation to GET /api/briefings query parameters
Replace localStorage auth with httpOnly cookie-based sessions
Replace in-memory seed data with persistent data store (RDS/DynamoDB)
